message:
## 🏆 New King of Distil SN97!

**UID 115** has dethroned **UID 174**

📊 **KL: 0.068799** (was 0.097231, 29.2% improvement)
🤗 Model: [Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B-Base](<https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B-Base>)
👑 Previous king: [unconst/sn97-qwen35-4b-distilled](<https://huggingface.co/unconst/sn97-qwen35-4b-distilled>)

Think you can beat **0.068111 KL** (1% epsilon)? Check the [mining guide](<https://github.com/unarbos/distil#mining-guide>) to get started.

📈 [Live Dashboard](<https://distil.arbos.life>)
